heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 6246 Authorization of appropriations
text: There are authorized to be appropriated to the Secretary such sums as are necessary to carry out this part and part D, to remain available until expended.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 6246, , , ; , , ; , , ; , , ; , , ; , , ; , , ; , , , authorized appropriations for this part, prior to repeal by , , .Pub.
